items.title: /api/agents p95 latency spike
items.body: Latency hit 1.24s at 14:22 UTC — correlated with planner-alpha cache flush.

primaryCta.label: Investigate
primaryCta.prompt: Investigate the anomaly on /api/agents at 14:22 UTC.

items.title: Pricing page traffic up 32%
items.body: Pricing sees a weekly spike. Want a short draft announcement for #growth?

primaryCta.label: Draft it
primaryCta.prompt: Draft an announcement for #growth highlighting new pricing tiers.

items.title: Compare planner-alpha vs v2
items.body: v2 is 38% faster (220ms vs 350ms), 0.4 pp better quality, ~11% higher cost.

primaryCta.label: Open in chat
primaryCta.prompt: Compare planner-alpha and v2 in detail with latency curves.

items.title: scribe-bx errored 12 times
items.body: All in the last 30 minutes. Possible deployment regression.

primaryCta.label: Investigate
primaryCta.prompt: Investigate scribe-bx error spike in the last 30 minutes.

items.title: Switch /chat to v2 by default
items.body: v2 outperforms on latency-sensitive paths. Estimated impact: −22% p95.

primaryCta.label: Apply
primaryCta.prompt: Walk me through switching /chat to planner-alpha v2 by default.

primaryCta.label: Open in chat
primaryCta.prompt: Show me token budget by agent for this week with overage flags.

items.title: Helix Labs onboarding plan
items.body: New customer Helix Labs needs a milestone plan. Want me to draft one?

primaryCta.label: Draft plan
primaryCta.prompt: Draft a 30-60-90 milestone plan for onboarding Helix Labs.

items.title: Cache hit rate dipped to 79%
items.body: Brief dip from 92% baseline at 11:46 UTC. Recovered after retry.

primaryCta.label: Investigate
primaryCta.prompt: Why did the cache hit rate dip to 79% at 11:46 UTC?

items.title: Generate Q1 release notes
items.body: 14 PRs merged since the last release. Ready to summarize?

primaryCta.label: Generate
primaryCta.prompt: Generate Q1 release notes from the merged PR list.

items.title: Explain the revenue metric
items.body: Sum of successfully billed invoices in period, net of refunds and credits.

primaryCta.label: Open in chat
primaryCta.prompt: Explain the Revenue metric — definition, formula, edge cases.

items.title: planner-alpha token surge
items.body: +42% above baseline. Correlated with the new pricing page launch.

primaryCta.label: Investigate
primaryCta.prompt: Why did planner-alpha tokens surge 42% above baseline?

items.title: Tighten guardrails on /chat
items.body: 3 jailbreak attempts in the last 24h. Want a stricter prompt template?

primaryCta.label: Tighten
primaryCta.prompt: Suggest a stricter guardrails prompt template for /chat.

items.title: What's the recent activity?
items.body: 7 events in last 12h: 2 deployments, 1 anomaly, 1 customer onboard, 3 budget alerts.

primaryCta.label: Open in chat
primaryCta.prompt: Summarize the recent activity feed in 3 bullets.

items.title: Promote retriever-xl v1.2
items.body: v1.2 finished training. Loss −12% vs v1.1. Want to promote to prod?

primaryCta.label: Promote
primaryCta.prompt: Walk me through promoting retriever-xl v1.2 to production.
